name: Postgres / Supabase
summary: Let agents run (read-only by default) SQL against your project's Postgres / Supabase DB.
description: Query the live database to answer real questions (counts, revenue, recent signups, error rows) and inspect schema -- the truth about a project is in its data. Supabase ships an official MCP server (run with --read-only); plain Postgres has an official reference server. Read-only role is the load-bearing guardrail.

requires.label: A Supabase access token (or a read-only Postgres connection string)
Your Supabase project ref (for Supabase mode)
